reviews.comment:
Salvando que había mucha gente, pero obvio que es de esperar en la ruta y en recambio turístico, excelente todo. Baños divinos y enormes.
Lo más bello y por lo que voy a volver cuando vaya a la costa, es el parque para descansar y hacer picnic que tiene. Hermoso. Mesas súper prolijas y comodas. Un espacio arbolado muy acojedor.

(Translated by Google)
Aside from the crowds, which is to be expected on the main road and during peak tourist season, everything was excellent. The restrooms were lovely and huge.
The best part, and the reason I'll definitely return when I go to the coast, is the park for relaxing and picnicking. It's beautiful. The tables are perfectly clean and comfortable. A very inviting wooded area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcnN5NlNREAE
